zenodo_record: <fill in the Zenodo record id after depositing>
_comment: Optional large convenience artifacts only. The benchmark itself ships in git and in the Zenodo deposit. After uploading a bundle, run scripts/fetch_data.py --make-manifest <dir> to populate sha256/size below.

files.name: hetdocqa_embeddings.tar.zst
files.contents: bge-m3 embedding .npy blobs only (vectors; no source text). Convenience: skip re-embedding. The corpus itself rebuilds from sources via scripts/build_hetdocqa.py.
